binary_descriptions.scripts/highfps_hook.so:
A companion shared library for highfps.py plugin.

High-performance hook for Quake Live server telemetry that captures per-client input processing rates (FPS) by intercepting the engine’s SV_ClientThink function. It installs a low-level trampoline detour at runtime, counts usercmd executions per client, and exposes these counters via a lightweight API. Since each unique usercmd corresponds closely to client frame updates, the measured rate provides an accurate estimate of effective FPS on the server side. The implementation uses pattern scanning to locate engine functions in memory, resolves internal structures dynamically, and maintains lock-free atomic counters for up to 64 clients. Designed for minimal overhead, it runs in native code and integrates with Python via ctypes for real-time FPS metrics without modifying the engine.

Enable highfps.py plugin in the Plugins tab to enable this hook.
